# GX2C (YB Consulting)

> GX2C is a Paris-based strategic advisory firm that helps organizations from large corporates to SMBs navigate complex transformations. We bring deep expertise in Finance & Treasury, Artificial Intelligence, and Information Systems. Legal name: YB Consulting. Website: ybcparis.com.

## Identity
- Commercial name: GX2C
- Legal entity: YB Consulting (EURL)
- Founded: 2018
- Founder: Yahya Benabdelkrim
- Location: 99 avenue Achille Peretti, 92200 Neuilly-sur-Seine, France
- Website: https://ybcparis.com
- Contact: contact@ybcparis.com

## What we do
GX2C is a management consulting firm with cross-functional expertise. We accompany clients from CAC 40 corporates to high-growth SMBs through their most critical transformation programs.

### Advisory (Core business)
Strategic and operational consulting across industries:
- Program management & transformation delivery
- SI Transformation: core system migration, cloud infrastructure, digital modernization
- Organization & process optimization
- Regulatory compliance and governance

### Finance & Treasury expertise
Deep domain knowledge in financial operations:
- Capital Markets: trading systems, post-trade, market infrastructure
- Treasury: cash management, FX hedging, liquidity optimization, payment systems (SEPA, SWIFT, TARGET2)
- Regulatory: MiFID II, EMIR, SFTR, PSD2/PSD3, Basel IV

### AI & Technology expertise
Proprietary AI solutions and technology advisory:
- Intelligent document processing (invoice OCR, receipt extraction)
- AI agents for business workflows (reconciliation, classification, automation)
- LLM-powered analytics and decision support
- Custom ML models for risk, compliance, and operations

## Clients
SNCF, SNCF Reseau, Societe des Grands Projets, Ernst & Young (EY), 3V Finance, Kouver

## Expertise keywords
Management Consulting, Strategic Advisory, Digital Transformation, Finance, Treasury, Capital Markets, Artificial Intelligence, LLM, Machine Learning, Regulatory Compliance, Program Management, SI Transformation

## Blog
https://ybcparis.com/blog — Expert insights on AI, finance, technology transformation, and advisory best practices
